_doc: Single source of truth for §10-V Banned-vocab spec ↔ banned-vocab.patterns mapping. tests/scripts/spec-pattern-drift.test.js validates both sides against this manifest. Adding a new pattern to hooks/banned-vocab.patterns OR a new banned term to spec §10-V REQUIRES updating an entry here, otherwise CI red. v0.7.1 R-N1 (drift test). The fixture is intentionally explicit (no regex auto-extraction): legibility on review > clever parsing. Fields per entry — term: the spec-listed phrase or the literal pattern body; category: one of EN-adj / EN-hedge / EN-ratio / ZH-adj / ZH-ratio; in_spec: true if §10-V text contains `term` verbatim; pattern: the regex from banned-vocab.patterns this entry is enforced by, null if exempt; exempt_reason: required when in_spec=false OR pattern=null; note: optional clarification.

entries.note: spec lists 'significantly improved'; pattern fires on the head word
char class accepts both 'production-ready' and 'production ready'
shared with EN-ratio; 'more efficient' enforced only inside an N% clause to keep FP rate down
char class accepts both 'industry-standard' and 'industry standard'

entries.exempt_reason: too common in legitimate English (banned-vocab.patterns header skip-list policy)

entries.note: matched via N% (faster|slower|better|more efficient) ratio pattern
spec uses unicode multiplication sign ×; pattern uses ASCII 'x' — drift acknowledged, both common in commits

entries.exempt_reason: too common in legitimate 中文 (parallel to likely/usually/often)
too common in legitimate 中文
too common in legitimate 中文
pattern-only: symmetric form derived from spec's 显著提升 + 大幅改善. Top-fired ZH pattern (5 hits in 30d audit). Promotion candidate — spec should add 显著改善 to §10-V ZH-adj list in next minor.
pattern-only: symmetric form derived from spec's 明显优于
pattern-only: symmetric form derived from spec's 大幅改善 + 显著提升

entries.note: matched via N倍(提升|加速|改善) ratio pattern; alternation members 加速/改善 are pattern-only symmetric forms
matched via N%(更快|...) ratio pattern; spec uses 'M% 更快' with space, pattern is contiguous — drift acknowledged

entries.exempt_reason: too common in legitimate 中文
too common in legitimate 中文
